entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `nomeTitular` TEXT NOT NULL, `finalNumero` TEXT NOT NULL, `bandeira` TEXT NOT NULL, `validade` TEXT NOT NULL, `limite` REAL NOT NULL, `template` TEXT NOT NULL)
